items.title: OpenMythos
items.description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature.
items.summary: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature.

items.title: browser-harness
items.description: Self-healing browser harness that enables LLMs to complete any task.
items.summary: The browser-harness is a self-healing tool enabling large language models to complete any browser task. It features direct communication with Chrome via WebSocket and is open-source. It was co-authored by Claude Opus.

items.title: huashu-design
items.description: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic
items.summary: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic

items.title: awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
items.description: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts fot the Openai API：image examples across portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments.
items.summary: GPT-Image 2 handles detailed prompts to generate complex visuals, including portraits, posters, and UI mockups. Curated collections on GitHub and social media feature top examples. The model excels in rendering text and detailed scenes from long prompts.

items.title: open-codesign
items.description: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.
items.summary: OpenCode is a free, open-source alternative to Anthropic’s Claude Code, supporting multiple AI models and offering one-click import of API keys. It's designed for terminal use and is MIT-licensed.

items.title: gpt2api
items.description: 基于 chatgpt.com 逆向的 OpenAI 兼容 SaaS 网关 · GPT-IMAGE-2 稳定 · 批量出图 · 多账号池 · 高并发调度 · 积分计费 · 技术交流QQ 群 382446
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. I do not provide details about specific projects or reverse-engineered tools. My purpose is to offer general information and support.

items.title: cc-design
items.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents
items.summary: CC-Design is a high-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents, offering templates and references for various design tasks. It includes routing logic for different design types and emphasizes high-quality output. The skill is maintained on GitHub.

items.title: chatgpt2api
items.summary: There is no official ChatGPT API. The underlying model for some versions is GPT-3.5. Users often access it via the Openai API.

items.title: mercury-agent
items.description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.
items.summary: Mercury Agent is a 24/7 AI from Cosmicstack Labs with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access via CLI or Telegram. It operates continuously and is designed for full control.

items.title: cangjie-skill
items.description: 把一本书蒸馏成一组可执行的 Agent Skills
items.summary: Cangjie-skill converts books into AI-executable skills, distilling knowledge into actionable frameworks. It uses AI to extract, verify, and structure book content into skills. Users can leverage these skills for practical applications.

items.title: OpenGame
items.description: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games
items.summary: OpenGame is an open-source framework for creating web games using specialized code models. It includes an evaluation pipeline called OpenGame-Bench to assess game quality. It was first introduced to address challenges in interactive application development.

items.title: agents-md
items.description: Drop-in AGENTS.md that makes every coding agent behave like a senior engineer instead of an eager intern. Kills sycophancy, stops drive-by refactors, forces verification loops. Synthesizes Karpathy's four principles and Boris Cherny's Claude Code workflow. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and the open standard.
items.summary: AGENTS.md elevates coding agents to senior engineer standards, eliminates sycophancy, and enforces rigorous verification. It integrates Karpathy's principles and Boris Cherny's workflow, ensuring high-quality code and testing. Compatible with various tools like Claude Code and Codex.

items.title: awesome-gpt-image-2
items.description: 🚀 Curated GPT Image 2 prompt library — OpenAI's next-gen image model with pixel-perfect text rendering, cross-image consistency, and commercial-grade illustration. 16 languages. Free & open source.
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. GPT Image 2 is an advanced image generation model by OpenAI. It offers improved text rendering and consistency for practical use cases.

items.title: web-design-skill
items.description: An AI agent skill that transforms AI-generated web pages from "functional" to "stunning."(Inspired by Claude Design)
items.summary: AI-generated web pages can be transformed from functional to stunning using specialized skills that enhance design aesthetics and user experience. These skills utilize semantic HTML and dynamic context loading. Trusted tools are available for easy integration.

items.title: Freebuff2API
items.description: 🚀 OpenAI-compatible Freebuff proxy with dynamic free-agent tracking, token rotation, and ready-to-use Docker deployment.
items.summary: Freebuff2API is an open-source, dynamic proxy for accessing multiple LLM providers with token rotation and Docker deployment. It enhances API efficiency and extends free tier usage. Bifrost offers a similar setup with unified access to various AI providers.

items.title: Cairn
items.description: AI 自动化通用问题解决 / AI 自动化渗透测试系统
items.summary: This AI system was built by a team of inventors at Amazon. It provides automated problem-solving and penetration testing tools based on AI. It integrates multiple large language models for versatile applications.

items.title: OmniAgent
items.description: An agent capable of self-evolving and dynamically hardening security
items.summary: OmniAgent is an open-source framework for self-evolving agents that dynamically enhance security through continuous improvement. It is inspired by OpenClaw and implements full-dimensional self-upgrades. The project is hosted on GitHub.

items.title: CrabTrap
items.description: An LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production
items.summary: CrabTrap is an open-source HTTP proxy that uses an LLM to secure AI agents by intercepting and evaluating requests against policies. It combines static rules and AI judgment to allow or block requests in real time. Brex developed it to prevent destructive actions by AI agents in production.

items.title: swarm-forge
items.description: A simple tool for coordinating several AI agents.
items.summary: Swarm-forge is a tool for coordinating AI agents, allowing projects to define their own roles. It focuses on flexible agent coordination and avoids fixed roles. It is open-source and available on GitHub.

items.title: AutoProber
items.description: Hardware hacker’s flying probe automation stack for agent-driven   target discovery, microscope mapping, safety-monitored CNC motion, probe review, and   controlled pin probing.
items.summary: AutoProber is an AI-driven hardware probing system that automates flying probe tasks using a CNC machine, microscope, and safety monitoring. It enables agent-guided target discovery and controlled pin probing. It is open-source and modular.

items.title: pi-computer-use
items.description: control your applications using pi-coding-agent. fully invisible.
items.summary: Pi-computer-use controls applications via pi-coding-agent, operating fully invisible. It enhances Pi CLI on macOS. The Pi coding agent is available for extensions and themes.

items.title: agent-style
items.description: 21 writing rules for AI coding and writing agents. Drop-in for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Aider, so their output reads like a tech pro.
items.summary: For AI coding agents, prioritize clarity, strict tech stack adherence, and concise, actionable instructions. Use precise language and avoid ambiguity. Follow established coding standards and frameworks.

items.title: agent-startup-kit
items.description: Reusable AI coding workflows for Claude Code and VS Code to ship auth, billing, and landing pages faster.
items.summary: AI coding workflows in 2026 significantly speed up auth, billing, and landing pages using tools like GitHub Copilot and VS Code extensions. Key players include Google Jules, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot Agent. These tools transform coding through autonomous programming and advanced AI features.

items.title: browser-harness-js
items.description: Self-healing browser harness that enables LLMs to complete any task
items.summary: Browser Harness JS is an open-source tool enabling LLMs full browser control. It's self-healing and can complete any browser task. It's built on Chrome DevTools Protocol.

items.title: alice
items.description: Analyse · Learn · Ingest · Curate · Export — AI-powered YOLO dataset management toolkit
items.summary: ALICE is an AI-powered toolkit for managing YOLO datasets, aiding in analysis, learning, ingestion, curation, and export. It supports Python and YOLO for image annotation and training. It's used in smart traffic solutions and construction projects.

items.title: esp-claw
items.description: ESP-Claw, a "Chat Coding" AI agent framework for IoT devices
items.summary: ESP-Claw is an AI agent framework for IoT devices that enables local decision-making without cloud dependency. It uses chat coding for programming and transforms ESP chips into active decision centers. It supports ESP32-C3 and S3 for edge AI applications.

items.title: expo-agent-spinners
items.description: 54 terminal-style agent-like spinners for React Native & Expo. Lightweight, zero native dependencies — just Text. No heavy UI threads
items.summary: Expo-agent-spinners offers 54 terminal-style spinners for React Native & Expo, lightweight with zero native dependencies. It's designed for smooth, non-blocking UI updates. Use it to enhance user experience with minimal overhead.

items.title: hi-kid
items.description: HiKid - Your AI English Pal. An desktop app built with React and TypeScript, targeting children in non-English-speaking countries who want to practice English speaking and listening.
items.summary: HiKid is a desktop app for children to practice English speaking and listening. It targets non-English-speaking children. It uses AI to help them learn English.

items.title: dspy-agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade DSPy 3.2.x agent skills + validated end-to-end examples for Claude Code and Codex CLI — fundamentals, evaluation, GEPA, BetterTogether, and RLM.
items.summary: DSPy 3.2.x agent skills include GEPA and RLM for prompt optimization. Validated examples exist for Claude Code and Codex CLI. These skills are production-ready and tested.

items.title: AITD
items.description: AI Trading Agent for Everyone
items.summary: AITD is a customizable AI trading agent that allows users to define trading strategies and can run on any machine. It supports paper trading and live trading. The agent uses K-line data to assist in decision-making.

items.title: ai-attestation
items.description: Track AI generated code in your repository. Open standard. Detects 19 AI coding tools. CC0 spec.
items.summary: AI-generated code now accounts for over 30% of commits in top GitHub repositories. Git AI tracks AI-generated code. AI tools save developers significant time on coding tasks.

items.title: Supervisor-Skills
items.description: 将博导十年科研经验炼化为可直接调用的 AI 技能。从 Idea 构思到论文投稿，你的 AI 科研副导师。
items.summary: AI 科研副导师将博导十年科研经验炼化，帮助从构思到论文投稿。基于AI技能，提供直接调用的研究支持。

items.title: anywhere-agents
items.description: One config to rule all your AI agents: portable (every project, every session), effective (curated writing, routing, skills), and safer (destructive-command guard).
items.summary: Anywhere-agents is a configuration system for AI agents that is portable across projects, effective with curated features, and safer with a destructive-command guard. It is maintained and follows users everywhere.

items.title: agent-skills
items.description: Reusable agent skills for Codex and compatible tools
items.summary: Reusable agent skills enable AI agents to perform various tasks like coding, searching, and automating workflows. Skills run with agent permissions, accessing file systems and executing commands. They enhance agent capabilities by turning general agents into specialists.

items.title: ascent-research
items.description: research cli for agent
items.summary: Ascent-Research is a Rust-based CLI for AI agent research, enabling persistent, resumable workflows. It stores session data on disk for long-term research. It is open-source and has 132 stars on GitHub.

items.title: geo-citation-lab
items.description: A dataset and analysis pipeline for studying how AI search engines select and use citations.
items.summary: The geo-citation-lab dataset and analysis pipeline studies how AI search engines select and use citations. It focuses on optimizing content for citation by AI systems. The practice of GEO aims to improve content visibility in AI-generated responses.

items.title: CyberVerse
items.description: CyberVerse is an open-source digital human agent platform with real-time video calling. Create an AI agent you can see and talk to, face to face, just like a video call.
items.summary: CyberVerse offers an open-source platform for real-time video calls with AI agents, providing them with a face and voice. PikaStream 1.0 is a key component, enabling live video interactions with AI avatars. This technology allows AI agents to conduct video calls, execute tasks, and maintain context.

items.title: agent-simulator
items.description: An iOS simulator in a browser you can inspect
items.summary: Agent-Simulator is an open-source tool that streams the iOS simulator into a browser for inspection and interaction. It uses React Native inspector and MCP bridge. It allows driving iOS apps directly from a web browser.

items.title: freellmapi
items.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only.
items.summary: The freellmapi is an AI proxy aggregating free-tier keys from multiple providers with automatic failover. It's for personal experimentation only. I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon.

items.title: auto-memory
items.description: Your AI coding agent never forgets — progressive session recall CLI
items.summary: Auto-memory is a CLI tool that enhances AI coding agents by providing unlimited context recall across sessions without needing a server or hooks. It uses local SQLite for instant recall and retains all session data for future reference.

items.title: AlphaBrain
items.description: The Comprehensive Toolkit for Embodied AI Models
items.summary: AlphaBrain is an open-source toolkit for embodied AI, integrating various architectures and algorithms. It offers a unified framework for perception, reasoning, and control. The GitHub repository hosts its primary development and community contributions.

items.title: llm-atomic-wiki
items.description: An extension of Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern: atom layer, topic-branches, two-layer Lint. Distilled from running the pattern end-to-end.
items.summary: LLM-atomic-wiki extends Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern with an atom layer, topic branches, and two-layer linting. It compiles raw sources into an interlinked markdown wiki. Remio's AI-native second brain offers an out-of-the-box implementation.

items.title: mcp-cli
items.description: save fork/exec overhead of ai code agent
items.summary: The CLI tools reduce the overhead of using MCP for AI code agents by allowing direct command execution and integration with various platforms. They streamline operations and save resources. This approach enhances efficiency and reduces unnecessary complexity.

items.title: embed-ai-tool
items.description: 面向 AI 编程助手的嵌入式开发技能集，为大模型提供 MCU 固件开发全流程能力。涵盖多工具链构建（Keil / IAR / CMake / PlatformIO）、烧录、GDB 调试、串口监视、Modbus / CAN / VISA 协议调试、外设驱动适配及流水线编排，支持 Linux、macOS、Windows 三平台。
items.summary: The AI tool supports MCU firmware development across Keil, IAR, CMake, and PlatformIO, with GDB debugging and protocol support for Modbus, CAN, and VISA. It automates code generation, flashing, and testing, compatible with Linux, macOS, and Windows.

items.title: MultiWorld
items.description: Official Implementation of MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models
items.summary: MultiWorld is a scalable framework for generating multi-view consistent videos for multi-agent scenarios, including games and robotics. It uses specialized modules for multi-agent control and global state encoding. It outperforms baselines in video fidelity and multi-view consistency.

items.title: ovo-local-llm
items.description: A private Claude-Code-style coding agent for Apple Silicon — run chat, code, and local model workflows on-device. MLX-native, Ollama/OpenAI API compatible, zero API keys.
items.summary: Ovo-local-llm is a local AI coding agent for Apple Silicon, offering a Claude Code-style experience without cloud dependency. It supports MLX and runs on-device. It's open-source and has no API keys.

items.title: WindsurfPoolAPI
items.description: Multi-account pool proxy for Windsurf — 113+ models (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Grok/Kimi) via OpenAI & Anthropic APIs, image upload, Cursor & Claude Code native / 企业级 Windsurf 多账号池化 API 代理
items.summary: WindsurfPoolAPI is a multi-account pool proxy for various AI models via APIs from providers like OpenAI and Anthropic. It supports over 113 models and includes features like image upload and native code execution. It's designed for enterprise-level use.

items.title: cavemem
items.description: Cross-agent persistent memory for coding assistants. Stored compressed. Retrieved fast. Local by default.
items.summary: Cross-agent persistent memory for coding assistants is stored locally, compressed, and retrieved quickly. It supports session resumption and context across sessions. This memory system enhances coding efficiency by remembering past decisions and errors.

items.title: n8n-Actual-Automation
items.description: 6 n8n workflows for Actual Budget — AI transaction categorization, envelope auto-funding, and weekly budget briefing via Telegram
items.summary: n8n automates budget management with AI categorization, Telegram notifications, and Google Sheets tracking. Essential workflows include expense tracking and budget briefings. Use n8n for efficient, AI-driven financial management.

items.title: ai-application-roadmap
items.description: A bilingual map of AI engineering evolution, real-world AI usage patterns, and vibe coding best practices.
items.summary: AI engineering evolution includes foundational software skills, real-world applications, and best practices for efficient coding. The roadmap for 2026 emphasizes structured learning paths and practical experience. Follow Python and tools for production AI systems.
